summary: Executed independent backend verification for deterministic runtime features and auth/dashboard regression. All requested deterministic endpoint flows, replay integrity, RNG parity, and formal verifier script passed.

critical.issue: Authenticated user can provide arbitrary server file path via log_path; endpoint reads that path directly without allowlist/sandbox, creating high-risk local file read surface.
When MNN_AUTH_SECRET is unset, code falls back to static string 'mnn-dev-secret-change-me', making JWT signing key predictable.

minor.issue: pySMT integration is SKIPPED in runtime (not installed). Script still returns success via optional fallback; formal check currently enforced only by Z3 path.

action_items: Restrict /deterministic/replay log_path to deterministic audit directory and reject external paths/symlinks.
Fail fast if MNN_AUTH_SECRET is missing in non-dev runtime (remove predictable fallback secret).
Decide whether pySMT must be mandatory for formal verification and enforce accordingly.
critical_code_review_comments: Replay endpoint currently trusts client-provided filesystem path; this is a security boundary issue even with auth.
Token secret fallback is deterministic and globally guessable; rotate and enforce env-provided secret.
Deterministic feature set is functionally healthy: lifecycle/order enforcement, basile hash stability, replay verification, and RNG parity all passed in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 added deterministic runtime regression file and revalidated auth/dashboard + cross-language RNG. pytest set: 14 passed. Formal script passed with Z3; pySMT still skipped in this environment.
rca of the issue: RCA-1 (/deterministic/replay): replay() directly forwards request.log_path to replay_log(), which opens filesystem path without canonical path checks -> authenticated file-read primitive. Repro: submit absolute path in log_path. Mitigation: canonicalize path and enforce prefix under deterministic log dir. RCA-2 (auth secret): _get_auth_secret() returns fixed fallback when env missing; JWTs become forgeable if attacker knows default. Mitigation: require env secret except explicit test mode.
